cards.title: Jensen Huang Secures Major Japan Tech Deals
cards.body: NVIDIA's CEO Jensen Huang concluded his Tokyo visit with agreements spanning Japan's entire tech ecosystem. The deals signal deepening partnerships across the region's technology sector.

cards.title: Apple Lawsuit Threatens OpenAI Hardware Plans
cards.body: Apple filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI, alleging misconduct involving over 400 former Apple employees now at OpenAI. The timing could significantly impact OpenAI's hardware ambitions and IPO plans.

cards.title: Current AI Builds Decentralized AI Web
cards.body: Nonprofit Current AI is developing AI infrastructure that includes no culture behind. The project spans multiple devices and AI chat applications.

cards.title: Moonshot AI Releases Updated Kimi Model
cards.body: Chinese company Moonshot AI launched a new version of its Kimi model this week. The release has sparked discussions about competitive AI development globally.

cards.title: Databricks Achieves $188B Valuation
cards.body: Databricks reached a $188 billion valuation, solidifying its position as AI's leading second-act company. The company published research demonstrating cost savings from open-weight AI models for coding.

cards.title: Vertu's $6,880 AI Agent Foldable Phone
cards.body: Luxury phone maker Vertu unveiled an AI agent-powered foldable device priced at $6,880. The device balances AI workflows, battery life, and premium security features.

cards.title: Agility Robotics Opens Fremont Training Center
cards.body: Agility Robotics established a new training facility for its Digit robots in Fremont, California. The move places the robotics company directly in Tesla's manufacturing heartland.

cards.title: Patreon Actively Blocks AI Scraping Bots
cards.body: Patreon partnered with Cloudflare to actively block bots trained on creator content without permission. The move represents a shift from passive robots.txt defenses to aggressive bot blocking.

cards.title: Google Vids Adds Personalized AI Avatars
cards.body: Google expanded Vids with AI avatars enabling users to star in personalized videos. The feature integrates Gemini Omni tools for generating and editing video content from prompts.

cards.title: Roblox Launches AI Game-Creation Feature
cards.body: Roblox introduced a 'Build' feature in its mobile app allowing users to generate games from text prompts. The AI-powered tool democratizes game creation for the platform's user base.

cards.title: Google AI Mode Expands to App Integration
cards.body: Google's AI Mode now enables task completion across integrated apps beyond question-answering. Users can perform actions directly within their regularly used applications.

cards.title: DoorDash Command-Line Tool Enters Beta
cards.body: DoorDash launched dd-cli, a command-line tool enabling developers and AI agents to search stores and place orders from terminals. The beta marks a shift toward AI-agent-first software design.

cards.title: AI Boom Reshapes India's Smartphone Market
cards.body: India's smartphone slowdown reflects how the AI boom is restructuring consumer electronics pricing and demand. Corporate strategy across the industry is shifting in response to AI hardware requirements.

cards.title: Inference Chips Attract $400M Investment
cards.body: A $400 million chip-backed loan signals the next wave of AI infrastructure financing. The deal highlights growing investment in inference chip technology beyond GPUs.

cards.title: Can Apple lawsuit derail OpenAI's hardware plans?
cards.body: Apple filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI, alleging misconduct by leadership and claiming over 400 former Apple employees work there. The timing could significantly impact OpenAI's IPO and hardware ambitions.

cards.title: Current AI builds World Wide Web of AI
cards.body: Nonprofit Current AI is developing inclusive AI technology accessible across devices and cultures. The project aims to ensure no population is left behind in AI advancement.

cards.title: Moonshot AI's Kimi model sparks competition
cards.body: Chinese company Moonshot AI released a new version of its Kimi AI model. The release highlights intensifying global competition in large language model development.

cards.title: Databricks hits $188B valuation as AI favorite
cards.body: Databricks raised funding at a $188 billion valuation, reinforcing its position as an AI infrastructure leader. The company published research on cost savings from open-weight AI models.

cards.title: Patreon blocks AI scraping with Cloudflare
cards.body: Patreon shifted from passive robots.txt defenses to active bot blocking in partnership with Cloudflare. The move protects creators' content from unauthorized AI training.

cards.title: Google Vids adds personalized AI avatars
cards.body: Google's Vids now lets users create videos starring digital versions of themselves powered by Gemini Omni. New tools enable video generation and editing from text prompts.

cards.title: Roblox launches AI-powered game creation feature
cards.body: Roblox's new 'Build' feature generates basic games from single text prompts. The mobile tool democratizes game creation through AI.

cards.title: Google AI Mode links apps and completes tasks
cards.body: Google expanded AI Mode beyond Q&A to complete tasks across popular applications. Users can now execute workflows directly through AI assistance.

cards.title: DoorDash opens AI-friendly command-line tool
cards.body: DoorDash launched dd-cli, enabling developers and AI agents to order directly from terminals. The tool exemplifies software designed for AI agents, not just humans.

cards.title: OpenAI unveils GPT-Red for model security
cards.body: OpenAI built GPT-Red, an LLM 'super-hacker' that tests defenses against cyberattacks. The tool helped GPT-5.6 achieve record security improvements.

cards.title: Anthropic discovers new insights in Claude AI
cards.body: Anthropic, valued at nearly $1 trillion, published findings on Claude's inner workings. The discovery offers new perspectives on AI interpretability.

cards.title: San Francisco removes nudify AI apps from stores
cards.body: San Francisco ordered Apple and Google to remove non-consensual nudity apps from their stores. The action targets AI-generated intimate imagery without permission.
